behavior="optional" defaultvalue="SYSTEM.GLOBALS.atvFillColor" desc="fill color" name="fillColor" substitute="$FILLCOLOR$" valuetype="global"/> <atv:parameter behavior="mandatory" defaultvalue="AGENT.OBJECTS.TimerConfig" desc="timer configuration node" group="Configuration" name="configNode" valuetype="address"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="" desc="timer id" group="Configuration" name="timerId" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="AGENT.OBJECTS" desc="start address" group="Configuration" name="startAddress" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="5" desc="time step interval" group="Configuration" name="timeStep" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="SYSTEM.SECURITY.RIGHTS" desc="necessary right" group="Security" name="right" valuetype="address"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" desc="activation address" group="Security" defaultvalue="true" desc="show recurring" group="Columns" name="column0" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="200" desc="column width" group="Columns" <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="140" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth4" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show description" group="Columns" name="column5" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="140" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth5" valuetype="number"/> name="fontColor" substitute="$FONTCOLOR$" valuetype="global"/> <atv:gridconfig enabled="true" gridstyle="lines" height="20" width="20"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="false" height="10" width="10"/> <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="680" version="1.2" width="1280" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" <stop offset="0.6771300448430493" stop-color="#464646"/> <stop offset="0.9775784753363229" stop-color="#000000"/> </linearGradient> </defs> <desc>Allows to handle scheduled events.</desc> <title>Timer</title> <metadata> <atv:parameter behavior="mandatory" defaultvalue="AGENT.OBJECTS.TimerConfig" desc="timer configuration node" group="Configuration" name="configNode" <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8' standalone='no'?> <svg height="680" version="1.2" width="1280" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:atv="http://webmi.atvise.com/2007/svgext" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <defs> <linearGradient gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox" id="linear_0" x1="-0.0150911" x2="-0.0150911" y1="-7.18755e-05" y2="1.10539"> <stop offset="0" stop-color="#75899f"/> <stop offset="0.7117903930131004" stop-color="#293646"/> </linearGradient> </defs> <desc>Allows to handle scheduled events.</desc> <title>Timer</title> <metadata> <atv:parameter behavior="mandatory" defaultvalue="AGENT.OBJECTS.TimerConfig" desc="timer configuration node" group="Configuration" name="configNode" valuetype="address"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="" desc="timer id" group="Configuration" name="timerId" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="AGENT.OBJECTS" desc="start address" group="Configuration" name="startAddress" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="5" desc="time step interval" group="Configuration" name="timeStep" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" config="SYSTEM.SECURITY.RIGHTS" desc="necessary right" group="Security" name="right" valuetype="address"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" desc="activation address" group="Security" name="activeNode" valuetype="address"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" desc="activation value" group="Security" name="activeValue" valuetype="string"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show recurring" group="Columns" name="column0" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="200" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth0" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show first occ." group="Columns" name="column1" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="85" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth1" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show last occ." group="Columns" name="column2" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="85" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth2" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show start time" group="Columns" name="column3" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="70" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth3" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show duration (min)" group="Columns" name="column4" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="140" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth4" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show description" group="Columns" name="column5" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="140" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth5" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show node" group="Columns" name="column6" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="160" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth6" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show value on" group="Columns" name="column7" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="90" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth7" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show value off" group="Columns" name="column8" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="90" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth8" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show status" group="Columns" name="column9" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="70" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth9" valuetype="number"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="true" desc="show action" group="Columns" name="column10" valuetype="bool"/> <atv:parameter behavior="optional" defaultvalue="70" desc="column width" group="Columns" name="columnWidth10" valuetype="number"/> <atv:gridconfig enabled="false" gridstyle="lines" height="20" width="20"/> <atv:snapconfig enabled="false" height="10" width="10"/> </metadata> <rect atv:refpx="640.23" atv:refpy="44.155" fill="url(#linear_0)" height="85" id="id_9" rx="15.985" ry="15.001" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="1" width="1278.816" x="0.822" y="0"/> <svg atv:refpx="438.941" atv:refpy="75" height="30" id="date_from1" width="160" x="358.941" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Steelblue.picker_date" y="3"> <atv:argument name="name" value="from"/> <atv:argument name="tabIndex" value="1"/> <atv:argument name="showTime" value="No"/> <atv:overwrite height="24.5" id="button_stroke" width="24.5" x="132.5" y="2.75"/> </svg> <svg atv:refpx="438.346" atv:refpy="110" height="30" id="date_to1" width="160" x="358.346" xlink:href="SYSTEM.LIBRARY.ATVISE.OBJECTDISPLAYS.Steelblue.picker_date" y="38"> y="2.75"/> </svg> <text atv:refpx="298.695" atv:refpy="15" fill="#ffffff" font-family="Arial" font-size="14" id="id_4" text-anchor="end" x="354" y="20">T{Start from}:</text> <text atv:refpx="304.598"
